name: Derbyshire Fruit Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the hot tea over the mixed dried fruit and sugar, and leave to soak overnight.
2. Preheat the oven to 300°F.
3. Grease and line a 7-inch cake tin or two 1 lb loaf tins.
4. Stir together the egg, self-raising flour, mixed spice, grated nutmeg, and marmalade with the fruit, sugar, and tea mixture.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared tin(s) and bake for 1½ - 2 hours, until firm to the touch and a skewer inserted into the cake comes out clean.
6. Do not open the oven during the first hour of baking time.
7. This cake will keep well.
